en.why.title: Why Bartendly Experiences
en.why.intro: A focused, curated approach for events that need more than just staffing.
en.why.items.curated.title: Curated professionals
en.why.items.curated.text: We work with experienced bartenders selected for reliability, presentation and event fit.
en.why.items.demanding.title: Built for demanding events
en.why.items.demanding.text: Trade shows, activations and premium corporate contexts require precision, consistency and strong presence.
en.why.items.coordination.title: Fast, human coordination
en.why.items.coordination.text: You speak directly with us. We understand your needs quickly and adapt the setup to your event.

en.testimonials.items.hk.quote: “We worked with Bartendly for a large private event in Hong Kong. The bartenders were professional, efficient and perfectly adapted to the atmosphere. Everything was smooth from start to finish.”
en.testimonials.items.hk.author: Alice
en.testimonials.items.bcn.quote: “Bartendly supported us during ICE at Fira Barcelona with a team of 4 bartenders over 3 days. Reliable, well-coordinated and exactly what we needed for a busy trade show environment.”

en.how.steps.one.title: Tell us your needs

en.gallery.intro: A premium hospitality aesthetic, built for events that need presence as much as service.
en.network.title: A curated bartender network, built city by city
en.network.text: Bartendly is expanding internationally, but each request is handled city by city to ensure the right bartender fit, availability and event quality.
en.network.text2: Each request is handled individually to confirm local availability, event fit and the right level of service.
en.network.text3: From small premium setups to larger event teams, we focus on presentation, reliability and smooth coordination.
en.operate.title: Where we operate
en.operate.intro: We are building an international bartender network, with strongest current focus in Hong Kong and Barcelona. Selected projects in other major event hubs can be supported depending on scope, timing and local availability.
en.operate.focus: Short-term commercial focus: Hong Kong event teams around Vinexpo Asia 2026, and Barcelona trade show teams around Fira Barcelona.

en.faq.title: Questions
en.faq.intro: A few answers to the questions clients usually have before getting in touch.
en.faq.items.types.question: What types of events do you support?
en.faq.items.types.answer: We focus on trade shows, brand activations and corporate events.
en.faq.items.cities.question: Do you operate only in specific cities?
en.faq.items.cities.answer: Our strongest current focus is Hong Kong and Barcelona. We can also support selected projects in other international event hubs depending on scope, timing and bartender availability.
en.faq.items.process.question: How does the process work?
en.faq.items.process.answer: You send your request, we discuss your needs, and we propose the right setup for your event.
en.faq.items.adapt.question: Can the service be adapted to our event?
en.faq.items.adapt.answer: Yes. Each event is different, and we adjust the team and setup accordingly.
en.faq.items.response.question: How quickly will I get a response?
en.faq.items.response.answer: We usually reply quickly after receiving your request.

Whether you need bartenders for HKCEC, Fira Barcelona or another major event venue, we help coordinate reliable cocktail service adapted to your event.

en.platform.seo.title: Bartendly | Cocktail events, bars, bartenders and hospitality experiences
en.platform.seo.description: Bartendly connects cocktail events, bars, bartenders and brands, with Bartendly Experiences for premium event bartender services.
en.platform.brand.name: Bartendly
en.platform.brand.tagline: The platform for bars, bartenders, brands and cocktail lovers
en.platform.hero.imageAlt: Premium cocktail event atmosphere representing the Bartendly ecosystem
en.platform.hero.title: Bartendly connects cocktail events, bars, bartenders and brands
en.platform.hero.subtitle: Bartendly is building a structured layer for the cocktail world — from discovering what is happening tonight to creating long-term visibility, services and future marketplace opportunities.
en.platform.hero.proof.one: Discover events and where to go
en.platform.hero.proof.two: Build history for bars, bartenders and brands
en.platform.hero.proof.three: Grow toward services, data and marketplace layers
en.platform.hero.support: Built from real hospitality operations, not from a generic startup slide deck.
en.platform.hero.card.title: Why it matters
en.platform.hero.card.text: The cocktail world is vibrant but fragmented. Bartendly creates a structured place where people, venues, events and brands can finally become visible, connected and useful over time.
en.platform.hero.card.item1.title: For professionals
en.platform.hero.card.item1.text: Visibility, opportunities and a more structured ecosystem.
en.platform.hero.card.item2.title: For guests
en.platform.hero.card.item2.text: A better way to discover bars, guest shifts and cocktail events.
en.platform.hero.card.item3.title: For partners
en.platform.hero.card.item3.text: A growing data and visibility layer around the real cocktail scene.
en.platform.clarity.title: What Bartendly is
en.platform.clarity.text1: Bartendly is a hospitality platform connecting cocktail events, bars, bartenders and brands into one structured ecosystem.
en.platform.clarity.text2: It helps people discover what is happening, gives professionals and venues more visibility, and creates the foundation for future services, marketplace flows and ecosystem tools.
en.platform.clarity.text3: Bartendly Experiences is the premium service layer of that ecosystem, focused on booking professional bartenders for trade shows, corporate events, brand activations and selected private events.
en.platform.experiences.title: Need bartenders for an event?
en.platform.experiences.text1: For trade shows, corporate events, brand activations and selected private events, the right entry point is Bartendly Experiences.
en.platform.experiences.text2: That is the premium service layer focused on helping clients book professional bartenders for real-world events.
en.platform.metrics.one.label: A practical entry point: discover what is happening now and where to go.
en.platform.metrics.two.label: Every event can strengthen the long-term visibility of bars, bartenders and brands.
en.platform.metrics.three.label: Services, loyalty, promotion, insights and marketplace flows can all grow on top of the same ecosystem.
en.platform.story.title: How Bartendly works
en.platform.story.intro: Bartendly is built around a simple principle: start from real events, connect the right people, and make that value persist over time.
en.platform.story.card1.title: Events first
en.platform.story.card1.text: Events are the most natural entry point. They create discovery, relevance, movement and immediate value for professionals and guests.
en.platform.story.card2.title: Connections that stay
en.platform.story.card2.text: An event should not disappear after one night. It should strengthen the profile of the host bar, the guest bartender, the participating brand and the city itself.
en.platform.story.card3.title: A real ecosystem
en.platform.story.card3.text: Bartendly is not just a calendar and not just a staffing service. It is growing into a useful ecosystem layer for the cocktail world.
en.platform.current.title: Concrete value already starts with discovery, visibility and structure
en.platform.current.intro: Bartendly already points toward a much bigger system. Even in early form, the platform is designed around useful layers that can compound over time.
en.platform.current.block1.title: Discover events and where to go tonight
en.platform.current.block1.text1: Bartendly can become the place where professionals and cocktail lovers see what is happening in a city, from guest shifts to cocktail weeks and special events.
en.platform.current.block1.text2: That makes the platform immediately useful, even before deeper marketplace and data layers are fully built.
en.platform.current.block1.imageAlt: Cocktail events discovery and nightlife planning inside Bartendly
en.platform.current.block2.title: Build history for bars, bartenders and brands
en.platform.current.block2.text1: Instead of disappearing into stories and flyers, events can become part of an ongoing public memory: what happened, who was involved, which bar hosted it, which brand supported it.
en.platform.current.block2.text2: That history can strengthen reputation, visibility and trust across the ecosystem.
en.platform.current.block2.imageAlt: Bartendly profiles and event history for bars, bartenders and brands
en.platform.current.block3.title: Create the base for services, promotion and loyalty
en.platform.current.block3.text1: Once bars, events, people and traffic become structured, Bartendly can naturally support offers, promotional visibility, loyalty mechanics and new tools for venues and brands.
en.platform.current.block3.text2: The key is that these are not random add-ons. They grow on top of the same ecosystem foundation.
en.platform.current.block3.imageAlt: Future Bartendly service, promotion and loyalty layers for bars and brands
en.platform.audiences.title: One page, several kinds of value
en.platform.audiences.intro: Bartendly is useful to different people for different reasons, but they all strengthen the same ecosystem when they interact with it.
en.platform.audiences.card1.label: Bartenders
en.platform.audiences.card1.title: Visibility, credibility and opportunities
en.platform.audiences.card1.text: For bartenders, Bartendly can become a place to appear, be seen, build profile value, follow opportunities and be connected to relevant bars, brands and events.
en.platform.audiences.card1.item2: Be associated with real events and venues
en.platform.audiences.card1.item3: Access future service and marketplace opportunities
en.platform.audiences.card2.label: Bars
en.platform.audiences.card2.title: Traffic, visibility and new service layers
en.platform.audiences.card2.text: For bars, Bartendly can become a discovery channel, an event memory, a promotion layer and later a place for offers, loyalty, staff visibility and service requests.
en.platform.audiences.card2.item1: Show what is happening at the venue
en.platform.audiences.card2.item2: Keep event history attached to the bar
en.platform.audiences.card2.item3: Grow toward promotion, loyalty and staffing tools
en.platform.audiences.card3.label: Brands
en.platform.audiences.card3.title: Presence, relevance and a future data layer
en.platform.audiences.card3.text: For brands, Bartendly can become a way to understand where they appear, with whom, in which cities and in what kind of events — while also giving them a meaningful visibility layer.
en.platform.audiences.card3.item1: Be linked to real events and venues
en.platform.audiences.card3.item2: Gain structured visibility beyond one post or one night
en.platform.audiences.card3.item3: Prepare the ground for insights and activation tools
en.platform.audiences.card4.label: Guests
en.platform.audiences.card4.title: A smarter way to explore the cocktail scene
en.platform.audiences.card4.text: For cocktail lovers and curious guests, Bartendly can become the place to discover what is happening, where to go, which bars matter and which people and brands shape the scene.
en.platform.audiences.card4.item1: See what is happening tonight or this week
en.platform.audiences.card4.item2: Discover bars and events with more context
en.platform.audiences.card4.item3: Follow a richer and more connected cocktail culture
en.platform.marketplace.eyebrow: From Bartendly Experiences to future marketplace
en.platform.marketplace.title: A natural evolution, not a disconnected idea
en.platform.marketplace.intro: Bartendly Experiences already proves a real coordination layer for premium hospitality services. Over time, that operational knowledge can evolve into more direct marketplace flows inside the app.
en.platform.marketplace.card1.title: What exists today
en.platform.marketplace.card1.text: A curated, human-led service model for premium events. That means real-world demand, real coordination and real understanding of what quality hospitality execution requires.
en.platform.marketplace.card1.step1.title: Curated service
en.platform.marketplace.card1.step1.text: High-quality event staffing through direct coordination.
en.platform.marketplace.card1.step2.title: Operational learning
en.platform.marketplace.card1.step2.text: Real knowledge about requests, quality, fit and execution.
en.platform.marketplace.card1.step3.title: Demand signal
en.platform.marketplace.card1.step3.text: A strong base for future marketplace logic inside the app.
en.platform.marketplace.card2.title: What it can become
en.platform.marketplace.card2.text: Over time, the same ecosystem can support more structured requests, matching, proposals, service listings and booking flows — without losing the premium quality logic that matters today.
en.platform.marketplace.card2.step1.title: Requests inside the app
en.platform.marketplace.card2.step1.text: Clients, bars and venues express needs in a structured way.
en.platform.marketplace.card2.step2.title: Relevant responses
en.platform.marketplace.card2.step2.text: Bartenders, bars or service providers respond with fit, not noise.
en.platform.marketplace.card2.step3.title: Marketplace layer
en.platform.marketplace.card2.step3.text: The service side becomes scalable because it grows from a real network and real data.
en.platform.data.title: The deeper value is not just one event — it is the network that forms over time
en.platform.data.intro: As events, venues, professionals and brands become structured and linked, Bartendly can become more useful, more intelligent and more defensible.
en.platform.data.card1.title: A richer map of the scene
en.platform.data.card1.text: Not just lists of bars or isolated events, but a living map of who is active, where energy is happening and how cities and communities connect.
en.platform.data.card2.title: Better visibility for everyone involved
en.platform.data.card2.text: Bars, bartenders and brands all benefit when events create lasting structured visibility instead of disappearing after one night.
en.platform.data.card3.title: A stronger foundation for tools
en.platform.data.card3.text: Promotion, loyalty, recommendations, marketplace flows and insights all become more valuable when they sit on top of real ecosystem data.
en.platform.data.card4.title: A more defensible product over time
en.platform.data.card4.text: The more Bartendly reflects the real cocktail world, the harder it becomes to replicate with generic content or generic nightlife listings.
en.platform.roadmap.title: A calm roadmap, built from real usefulness
en.platform.roadmap.intro: The point is not to add random features. The point is to deepen the value of the same ecosystem layer in a credible sequence.
en.platform.roadmap.card1.title: Events, discovery and profiles
en.platform.roadmap.card1.text: Strengthen the entry point: discover what is happening, where to go, who is involved and how bars, bartenders and brands are connected.
en.platform.roadmap.card2.title: Bar value layers
en.platform.roadmap.card2.text: Build more utility for venues through visibility, offers, loyalty, bar pages, event traffic and richer structured presence.
en.platform.roadmap.card3.title: Marketplace and insights
en.platform.roadmap.card3.text: Let services, requests, proposals, bookings and more advanced ecosystem insights grow on top of the same connected network.
en.platform.cta.title: Join, visit or talk to us
en.platform.cta.text: Whether you are a bartender, a bar, a brand, a guest, a partner or a potential investor, Bartendly is worth understanding now because the ecosystem becomes more valuable as it becomes more connected.
en.platform.footer.text: A growing platform connecting bars, bartenders, brands, events and cocktail lovers.
en.platform.stickyCta.label: Open Bartendly
en.platform.choice.title: Explore the platform or book the service layer
en.platform.choice.intro: Bartendly combines a growing app for the cocktail ecosystem with a premium service layer for real-world hospitality execution.
en.platform.choice.app.label: Bartendly App
en.platform.choice.app.title: Discover events, bars, bartenders and brands
en.platform.choice.app.text: Use Bartendly to see what is happening tonight or this week, follow guest shifts and festivals, explore bars, and understand who is shaping the cocktail scene.
en.platform.choice.app.note: For cocktail lovers, bartenders, bars, brands and event organizers.
en.platform.choice.experiences.label: Bartendly Experiences
en.platform.choice.experiences.title: Book professional bartenders for events
en.platform.choice.experiences.text: For trade shows, corporate events, brand activations and selected private events, Bartendly Experiences helps clients find professional bartenders and deliver premium hospitality service.
en.platform.choice.experiences.note: For companies, agencies, brands, venues and private clients.

en.hk.useCases.title: Bartenders for Hong Kong events
en.hk.useCases.intro: A focused service for professional and premium events where reliability, presentation and execution matter.
en.hk.useCases.corporate.title: Corporate events
en.hk.useCases.corporate.text: Professional cocktail service for client receptions, office events, hospitality suites and business gatherings.
en.hk.useCases.tradeShows.title: HKCEC trade shows
en.hk.useCases.tradeShows.text: Bartenders for exhibition stands, trade fairs, product demos and professional hospitality moments.
en.hk.useCases.activations.title: Brand activations
en.hk.useCases.activations.text: Cocktail service designed to support brand presence, guest interaction and memorable experiences.
en.hk.useCases.private.title: Premium private events
en.hk.useCases.private.text: Selected private dinners, parties and celebrations where a professional bartender improves the experience.
en.hk.why.title: Why Bartendly in Hong Kong
en.hk.why.intro: A direct, curated approach for clients who need reliable bartenders without operational noise.
en.hk.why.curated.title: Selected event bartenders
en.hk.why.curated.text: We connect clients with relevant bartenders through the Bartendly network, based on event type, timing and availability.
en.hk.why.context.title: Built for premium settings
en.hk.why.context.text: Hong Kong events often require sharp presentation, fast service and strong hospitality presence. That is the standard we aim for.
en.hk.why.coordination.title: Fast human coordination
en.hk.why.coordination.text: You send the request, we clarify what matters, and we help shape a practical setup for the event.
en.hk.setup.title: Flexible cocktail service
en.hk.setup.intro: Your event may already have a venue, alcohol supplier, glassware or production team. Bartendly helps coordinate the bartender side clearly.
en.hk.setup.card.title: What we can help with
en.hk.setup.card.text: We adapt the bartender setup to the event format rather than forcing one rigid package.
en.hk.setup.item.three: Trade show and brand activation formats
en.hk.setup.item.four: Optional support coordinating tools, ice, glassware or suppliers
en.hk.how.title: How it works
en.hk.how.one.title: Send the event details
en.hk.how.one.text: Date, venue, format, expected guests and what you already have in place.
en.hk.how.two.title: We review the setup
en.hk.how.two.text: We clarify the number of bartenders, timing, service style and practical constraints.
en.hk.how.three.title: We coordinate the team
en.hk.how.three.text: Relevant bartenders are contacted through the Bartendly network and app.
en.hk.how.four.title: You confirm
en.hk.how.four.text: You receive a clear proposal and confirm the event team.
en.hk.proof.title: Trusted for Hong Kong events
en.hk.proof.intro: Real client feedback from a recent Hong Kong event.
en.hk.proof.quote: “We worked with Bartendly for a large private event in Hong Kong. The bartenders were professional, efficient and perfectly adapted to the atmosphere. Everything was smooth from start to finish.”
en.hk.bartender.title: Bartender in Hong Kong?
en.hk.bartender.text: Join Bartendly to be visible for paid event opportunities, guest shifts, jobs and professional collaborations.
en.hk.faq.title: Questions
en.hk.faq.intro: A few answers before you request bartenders in Hong Kong.
en.hk.faq.corporate.question: Can I hire bartenders for a corporate event in Hong Kong?
en.hk.faq.corporate.answer: Yes. Bartendly Experiences helps coordinate professional bartenders for corporate events, client receptions, office events and brand activations in Hong Kong.
en.hk.faq.hkcec.question: Can you support events at HKCEC?
en.hk.faq.hkcec.answer: Yes. We can help with bartender staffing for trade shows, exhibition stands and professional events around the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre, depending on event scope and availability.
en.hk.faq.materials.question: Do you provide alcohol, glassware and ice?
en.hk.faq.materials.answer: The setup depends on the event. Clients, venues or suppliers may provide alcohol, glassware and ice, and Bartendly can help coordinate the right cocktail service around the available setup.
en.hk.faq.notice.question: How much notice do you need?
en.hk.faq.notice.answer: The earlier the better, especially for multi-day trade shows or larger teams. For smaller events, we may still be able to help depending on date, location and availability.
en.hk.faq.bartenders.question: Can Hong Kong bartenders join Bartendly?
en.hk.faq.bartenders.answer: Yes. Bartenders in Hong Kong can join Bartendly to be visible for paid event opportunities, guest shifts, jobs and professional collaborations.
en.hk.seo.title: Professional bartenders for events in Hong Kong
en.hk.seo.paragraph: Bartendly Experiences helps clients hire professional bartenders in Hong Kong for corporate events, HKCEC trade shows, exhibition stands, brand activations and premium private events. Whether you are planning a business reception in Central, an activation in Wan Chai, a trade show moment at HKCEC or a private event in Hong Kong, Bartendly helps coordinate reliable cocktail service through selected bartenders and a clear human process.
en.hk.cta.title: Request bartenders in Hong Kong
en.hk.cta.text: Tell us the date, venue and event format. We’ll get back to you quickly with the right setup.
en.hk.footer.text: Professional bartenders for corporate events, HKCEC trade shows, brand activations and premium private events in Hong Kong.

en.bcn.useCases.title: Built for Fira Barcelona, stands and business events
en.bcn.useCases.intro: Barcelona is a trade show city. This page is focused on the real need: reliable bartenders who can support exhibitors, agencies and brands during professional events.
en.bcn.useCases.tradeShows.title: Fira Barcelona stands
en.bcn.useCases.tradeShows.text: Bartenders for exhibition stands, product demos, hosted cocktail moments and business hospitality during fairs at Gran Via or Montjuïc.
en.bcn.useCases.multiDay.title: Fair staffing over several days
en.bcn.useCases.multiDay.text: Support for multi-day schedules, rotating shifts, busy stand periods and repeated client receptions during the same exhibition.
en.bcn.useCases.activations.title: Brand activations
en.bcn.useCases.activations.text: Cocktail service for product launches, spirits activations, showroom events, agency projects and premium brand moments in Barcelona.
en.bcn.useCases.receptions.title: Corporate receptions
en.bcn.useCases.receptions.text: Professional bartenders for client drinks, hotel receptions, networking events, private rooms and post-fair business gatherings.
en.bcn.why.title: Why Bartendly for Barcelona trade shows
en.bcn.why.intro: Trade shows are not normal parties. They need punctuality, presentation, speed and a setup that works with the stand, venue and production constraints.
en.bcn.why.fira.title: Fira-style execution
en.bcn.why.fira.text: We understand the difference between a casual party and an exhibition environment: fixed hours, stand rules, guest flow and professional presentation.
en.bcn.why.team.title: Right team for the format
en.bcn.why.team.text: One bartender for a small client moment, several bartenders for a busy stand, or a rotating setup for multi-day events.
en.bcn.why.languages.title: International guest context
en.bcn.why.languages.text: Barcelona fairs attract international visitors. The bartender selection can prioritize professional presentation, English communication and hospitality presence.
en.bcn.setup.title: A practical setup for exhibitors and agencies
en.bcn.setup.intro: Most trade show clients already have a stand builder, venue rules, a production team or supplier constraints. Bartendly focuses on making the bartender side clear and workable.
en.bcn.setup.card.title: What we clarify before quoting
en.bcn.setup.card.text: The goal is not to sell a vague cocktail package. The goal is to define the right service for the real conditions of your Barcelona event.
en.bcn.setup.item.one: Fair or venue name, stand location and access constraints
en.bcn.setup.item.two: Opening hours, service windows and number of event days
en.bcn.setup.item.three: Expected guest flow and number of bartenders needed
en.bcn.setup.item.four: Alcohol, ice, glassware, tools and menu responsibilities
en.bcn.how.title: How it works
en.bcn.how.intro: A direct process for exhibitors, event agencies and corporate teams.
en.bcn.how.one.title: Send the trade show details
en.bcn.how.one.text: Fair name, dates, venue, stand or room setup, service hours and expected guest volume.
en.bcn.how.two.title: We define the bartender setup
en.bcn.how.two.text: We clarify team size, shift duration, tools, cocktail menu and what is provided by the client or suppliers.
en.bcn.how.three.title: We coordinate through Bartendly
en.bcn.how.three.text: Relevant Barcelona bartenders are contacted through the Bartendly network and app.
en.bcn.how.four.title: You confirm the team
en.bcn.how.four.text: You receive a clear proposal for the service, timing and bartender team.
en.bcn.proof.title: Already used at Fira Barcelona
en.bcn.proof.intro: Real proof from a professional trade show environment in Barcelona.
en.bcn.proof.quote: “Bartendly supported us during ICE at Fira Barcelona with a team of 4 bartenders over 3 days. Reliable, well-coordinated and exactly what we needed for a busy trade show environment.”
en.bcn.proof.meta: Event Team — Trade Show, Fira Barcelona
en.bcn.bartender.title: Bartender in Barcelona?
en.bcn.bartender.text: Join Bartendly to be visible for paid event opportunities, trade show shifts, guest shifts, jobs and professional collaborations.
en.bcn.faq.title: Questions
en.bcn.faq.intro: A few answers before you request bartenders for a Barcelona trade show or corporate event.
en.bcn.faq.tradeShow.question: Can I hire bartenders for a trade show at Fira Barcelona?
en.bcn.faq.tradeShow.answer: Yes. Bartendly Experiences helps coordinate professional bartenders for Fira Barcelona trade shows, exhibition stands, product demos, corporate receptions and brand activations.
en.bcn.faq.multiDay.question: Can you support multi-day exhibition stands?
en.bcn.faq.multiDay.answer: Yes. Bartendly can help coordinate bartenders for multi-day trade show shifts, depending on event dates, opening hours, expected volume and bartender availability.
en.bcn.faq.materials.question: Do you only provide staff, or can you help with the cocktail setup?
en.bcn.faq.materials.answer: The setup depends on the event. Many exhibitors or venues already provide alcohol, ice, glassware or suppliers. Bartendly can help coordinate the bartender side and advise on a practical cocktail service format.
en.bcn.faq.notice.question: How much notice do you need?
en.bcn.faq.notice.answer: The earlier the better, especially for large fairs and multi-day events. Shorter notice may still work for smaller receptions depending on the date and bartender availability.
en.bcn.faq.bartenders.question: Can Barcelona bartenders join Bartendly?
en.bcn.faq.bartenders.answer: Yes. Bartenders in Barcelona can join Bartendly to be visible for paid event opportunities, trade show shifts, guest shifts, jobs and professional collaborations.
en.bcn.seo.title: Professional trade show bartenders in Barcelona
en.bcn.seo.paragraph: Bartendly Experiences helps exhibitors, agencies and corporate teams hire professional bartenders in Barcelona for Fira Barcelona trade shows, exhibition stands, product launches, brand activations and client receptions. Whether your event is at Gran Via, Montjuïc, a hotel, showroom or private venue, Bartendly helps coordinate reliable cocktail service through selected bartenders and a clear human process.
en.bcn.cta.title: Request bartenders in Barcelona
en.bcn.cta.text: Tell us the fair, date, venue and service format. We’ll get back to you quickly with the right setup.
en.bcn.footer.text: Professional bartenders for Fira Barcelona trade shows, exhibition stands, brand activations and corporate receptions in Barcelona.

whatBartendly.heroTitle: Find cocktail events. Add yours. Hire bartenders.
whatBartendly.heroText: Bartendly turns scattered cocktail events into one live calendar — and helps clients hire professional bartenders for private events, brand activations, trade shows and corporate hospitality.
whatBartendly.heroValue: The cocktail scene becomes searchable, visible and actionable.
whatBartendly.availability: iPhone app available now. Web calendar available for everyone.
whatBartendly.pathsIntro: Three clear actions. No account needed to browse the calendar.
whatBartendly.cardCalendarText: See guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses and cocktail events by city and date.
whatBartendly.cardAddText: Hosting a guest shift, takeover or masterclass? Publish it so the cocktail scene can find it.
whatBartendly.cardHireText: Need bartenders for a private event, brand activation, trade show or corporate hospitality?
whatBartendly.whyTitle: Cocktail events should not disappear in Stories.
whatBartendly.whyText: Guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses and brand activations often disappear inside Instagram stories, flyers and private chats.
whatBartendly.whyLine: Bartendly gives them a place to be discovered, connected to bars and bartenders, and turned into real hospitality opportunities.
whatBartendly.finalTitle: Start with what you need today.
whatBartendly.finalIntro: Open the calendar, add your event, download the app or hire bartenders.
whatBartendly.footerLine: Cocktail events, bartenders and premium hospitality experiences.

es.brand.name: Bartendly Experiences
es.brand.tagline: Bartenders profesionales para ferias, activaciones de marca y eventos corporativos
es.hero.title: Contrata bartenders profesionales para ferias, activaciones de marca y eventos corporativos
es.hero.subtitle: Coordinación internacional de bartenders, con foco actual en Hong Kong y Barcelona, y ciudades seleccionadas bajo solicitud.
es.hero.primaryCtaNote: Respuesta rápida. Sin compromiso. Respondemos en pocas horas.
es.hero.proof.one: Foco en Hong Kong y Barcelona
es.hero.support: Ya utilizado para ferias en Fira Barcelona y eventos premium en Hong Kong. Foco actual: equipos para eventos en Hong Kong y Barcelona.

es.useCases.title: Experiencias de cóctel para
es.useCases.intro: Un servicio enfocado en eventos profesionales donde la fiabilidad, la presentación y la ejecución son clave.
es.useCases.items.tradeShows.title: Ferias
es.useCases.items.tradeShows.text: Bartenders profesionales para stands, ferias internacionales y eventos de negocio.
es.useCases.items.activations.title: Activaciones de marca
es.useCases.items.activations.text: Servicio de cócteles diseñado para reforzar la presencia, la interacción y la memorabilidad de la marca.
es.useCases.items.corporate.title: Eventos corporativos
es.useCases.items.corporate.text: Servicio fiable y de alta calidad para eventos internos, eventos de clientes y experiencias premium.
es.why.title: Por qué Bartendly Experiences
es.why.intro: Un enfoque preciso y curado para eventos que necesitan más que solo personal.
es.why.items.curated.title: Profesionales seleccionados
es.why.items.curated.text: Trabajamos con bartenders experimentados, elegidos por su fiabilidad, presencia y adecuación al evento.
es.why.items.demanding.title: Pensado para eventos exigentes
es.why.items.demanding.text: Ferias, activaciones y contextos corporativos premium requieren precisión, consistencia y una fuerte presencia.
es.why.items.coordination.title: Coordinación rápida y humana
es.why.items.coordination.text: Hablas directamente con nosotros. Entendemos tu necesidad rápidamente y adaptamos la solución a tu evento.
es.testimonials.title: La confianza de los organizadores de eventos
es.testimonials.intro: Algunas palabras de eventos y colaboraciones recientes.
es.testimonials.items.hk.quote: “Trabajamos con Bartendly para un gran evento privado en Hong Kong. Los bartenders fueron profesionales, eficientes y se adaptaron perfectamente al ambiente. Todo fue fluido de principio a fin.”
es.testimonials.items.hk.author: Alice
es.testimonials.items.bcn.quote: “Bartendly nos apoyó durante ICE en Fira Barcelona con un equipo de 4 bartenders durante 3 días. Fiables, bien coordinados y exactamente lo que necesitábamos para un entorno de feria muy exigente.”
es.testimonials.items.bcn.author: Equipo del evento
es.how.title: Cómo funciona
es.how.steps.one.title: Cuéntanos tu necesidad
es.how.steps.one.text: Comparte lo esencial en pocos segundos.
es.how.steps.two.title: Definimos la solución adecuada
es.how.steps.two.text: Según el tipo de evento, la escala y el contexto.
es.how.steps.three.title: Confirmas
es.gallery.title: Visualiza el ambiente
es.gallery.intro: Una estética premium de hospitalidad, pensada para eventos donde la presencia importa tanto como el servicio.
es.network.title: Una red curada de bartenders, construida ciudad por ciudad
es.network.text: Bartendly se está expandiendo internacionalmente, pero cada solicitud se gestiona ciudad por ciudad para asegurar el encaje, la disponibilidad y la calidad del evento.
es.network.text2: Cada solicitud se gestiona de forma individual para confirmar disponibilidad local, encaje con el evento y nivel de servicio adecuado.
es.network.text3: Desde montajes premium pequeños hasta equipos más amplios, priorizamos presentación, fiabilidad y coordinación fluida.
es.operate.title: Dónde operamos
es.operate.intro: Estamos construyendo una red internacional de bartenders, con foco actual más fuerte en Hong Kong y Barcelona. También podemos apoyar proyectos seleccionados en otros hubs internacionales según el alcance, el timing y la disponibilidad local.
es.operate.focus: Foco comercial a corto plazo: equipos para eventos en Hong Kong alrededor de Vinexpo Asia 2026, y equipos para ferias en Barcelona alrededor de Fira Barcelona.

es.operate.group1.item4: Madrid — proyectos corporativos y ferias seleccionadas

es.operate.city.madrid.title: Madrid
es.operate.city.madrid.text: Eventos corporativos y proyectos de feria seleccionados bajo solicitud
es.operate.city.other.title: Otras ciudades internacionales bajo solicitud
es.operate.city.other.text: París, Roma, Milán, Berlín, Singapur, Dubái, Bangkok, Taipéi y otros hubs internacionales, según alcance, timing y disponibilidad local.
es.faq.title: Preguntas
es.faq.intro: Respuestas a las preguntas más habituales antes de ponerse en contacto.
es.faq.items.types.question: ¿Qué tipo de eventos cubrís?
es.faq.items.types.answer: Nos enfocamos en ferias, activaciones de marca y eventos corporativos.
es.faq.items.cities.question: ¿Trabajáis solo en ciertas ciudades?
es.faq.items.cities.answer: Nuestro foco actual más fuerte es Hong Kong y Barcelona. También podemos apoyar proyectos seleccionados en otros hubs internacionales según el alcance, el timing y la disponibilidad de bartenders.
es.faq.items.process.question: ¿Cómo funciona el proceso?
es.faq.items.process.answer: Nos envías tu solicitud, hablamos contigo y definimos la solución adecuada para tu evento.
es.faq.items.adapt.question: ¿Se puede adaptar el servicio a nuestro evento?
es.faq.items.adapt.answer: Sí. Cada evento es distinto y ajustamos el equipo y el montaje según la necesidad.
es.faq.items.response.question: ¿Cuánto tardáis en responder?
es.faq.items.response.answer: Normalmente respondemos muy rápido después de recibir la solicitud.
es.bartender.title: ¿Eres bartender?
es.bartender.text: Únete a Bartendly para ser visible para oportunidades pagadas, guest shifts, trabajos y colaboraciones profesionales.
es.cta.title: Solicita bartenders para tu evento
es.cta.text: Te responderemos rápidamente con la mejor configuración para tu evento.
es.seo.bottomParagraph: Bartendly Experiences proporciona bartenders profesionales para ferias, stands, activaciones de marca y eventos corporativos en hubs internacionales seleccionados, con foco actual más fuerte en Hong Kong y Barcelona. Tanto si necesitas bartenders para HKCEC, Fira Barcelona u otro gran venue, te ayudamos a coordinar un servicio de coctelería fiable adaptado a tu evento.
es.stickyCta.label: Contratar bartenders para tu evento
es.footer.text: Bartenders profesionales para ferias, activaciones de marca y eventos corporativos.
es.lang.label: Idioma

es.form.error.desktop: Algo salió mal. Inténtalo de nuevo o contáctanos por email.
es.form.error.network: Error de red. Inténtalo de nuevo.
es.form.success.desktop: Gracias. Tu solicitud ha sido enviada. Te responderemos muy pronto.
es.platform.seo.title: ¿Qué es Bartendly? | La plataforma que conecta eventos de coctelería, bares, bartenders y marcas
es.platform.seo.description: Descubre qué es Bartendly: una plataforma que conecta eventos de coctelería, bares, bartenders y marcas, creada para hacer el ecosistema de la hospitalidad más visible, estructurado y útil con el tiempo.
es.platform.brand.name: Bartendly
es.platform.brand.tagline: La plataforma para bares, bartenders, marcas y amantes de la coctelería
es.platform.hero.imageAlt: Ambiente premium de evento de coctelería que representa el ecosistema Bartendly
es.platform.hero.title: Bartendly conecta eventos de coctelería, bares, bartenders y marcas
es.platform.hero.subtitle: Bartendly está construyendo una capa estructurada para el mundo de la coctelería: desde descubrir qué está pasando esta noche hasta crear visibilidad a largo plazo, servicios y futuras oportunidades de marketplace.
es.platform.hero.proof.two: Construye historial para bares, bartenders y marcas
es.platform.hero.proof.three: Evoluciona hacia servicios, datos y capas de marketplace
es.platform.hero.support: Construido desde operaciones reales de hospitality, no desde una presentación genérica de startup.
es.platform.hero.card.title: Por qué importa
es.platform.hero.card.text: El mundo de la coctelería es vibrante, pero fragmentado. Bartendly crea un espacio estructurado donde personas, lugares, eventos y marcas pueden finalmente ser visibles, estar conectados y ser útiles con el tiempo.
es.platform.hero.card.item1.title: Para profesionales
es.platform.hero.card.item1.text: Visibilidad, oportunidades y un ecosistema más estructurado.
es.platform.hero.card.item2.title: Para invitados
es.platform.hero.card.item2.text: Una mejor forma de descubrir bares, guest shifts y eventos de coctelería.
es.platform.hero.card.item3.title: Para partners
es.platform.hero.card.item3.text: Una capa creciente de datos y visibilidad alrededor de la escena real de la coctelería.
es.platform.clarity.title: Qué es Bartendly
es.platform.clarity.text1: Bartendly es una plataforma de hospitality que conecta eventos de coctelería, bares, bartenders y marcas en un ecosistema estructurado.
es.platform.clarity.text2: Ayuda a descubrir qué está pasando, da más visibilidad a profesionales y venues, y crea la base para futuros servicios, flujos de marketplace y herramientas del ecosistema.
es.platform.clarity.text3: Bartendly Experiences es la capa premium de servicios de ese ecosistema, centrada en la reserva de bartenders profesionales para ferias, eventos corporativos, activaciones de marca y determinados eventos privados.
es.platform.experiences.title: ¿Necesitas bartenders para un evento?
es.platform.experiences.text1: Para ferias, eventos corporativos, activaciones de marca y determinados eventos privados, la entrada correcta es Bartendly Experiences.
es.platform.experiences.text2: Es la capa de servicio premium enfocada en ayudar a los clientes a reservar bartenders profesionales para eventos reales.
es.platform.metrics.one.label: Un punto de entrada práctico: descubre qué está pasando ahora y dónde ir.
es.platform.metrics.two.label: Cada evento puede reforzar la visibilidad a largo plazo de bares, bartenders y marcas.
es.platform.metrics.three.label: Servicios, fidelización, promoción, insights y flujos de marketplace pueden crecer sobre el mismo ecosistema.
es.platform.story.title: Cómo funciona Bartendly
es.platform.story.intro: Bartendly se basa en un principio simple: partir de eventos reales, conectar a las personas adecuadas y hacer que ese valor permanezca en el tiempo.
es.platform.story.card1.title: Primero los eventos
es.platform.story.card1.text: Los eventos son el punto de entrada más natural. Generan descubrimiento, relevancia, movimiento y valor inmediato para profesionales e invitados.
es.platform.story.card2.title: Conexiones que permanecen
es.platform.story.card2.text: Un evento no debería desaparecer después de una noche. Debería reforzar el perfil del bar anfitrión, del bartender invitado, de la marca participante y de la propia ciudad.
es.platform.story.card3.title: Un ecosistema real
es.platform.story.card3.text: Bartendly no es solo un calendario ni solo un servicio de staffing. Está evolucionando hacia una capa de ecosistema realmente útil para el mundo de la coctelería.
es.platform.current.eyebrow: Lo que Bartendly ya hace posible
es.platform.current.title: El valor concreto ya empieza con descubrimiento, visibilidad y estructura
es.platform.current.intro: Bartendly ya apunta hacia un sistema mucho mayor. Incluso en una fase temprana, la plataforma está diseñada alrededor de capas útiles que pueden multiplicar su valor con el tiempo.
es.platform.current.block1.title: Descubre eventos y dónde ir esta noche
es.platform.current.block1.text1: Bartendly puede convertirse en el lugar donde profesionales y amantes de la coctelería vean qué está pasando en una ciudad, desde guest shifts hasta cocktail weeks y eventos especiales.
es.platform.current.block1.text2: Eso hace que la plataforma sea útil de inmediato, incluso antes de que las capas más profundas de marketplace y datos estén completamente desarrolladas.
es.platform.current.block1.imageAlt: Descubrimiento de eventos de coctelería y planificación de salidas dentro de Bartendly
es.platform.current.block2.title: Construir historial para bares, bartenders y marcas
es.platform.current.block2.text1: En lugar de desaparecer en stories y flyers, los eventos pueden formar parte de una memoria pública continua: qué pasó, quién participó, qué bar lo organizó y qué marca lo apoyó.
es.platform.current.block2.text2: Ese historial puede reforzar reputación, visibilidad y confianza en todo el ecosistema.
es.platform.current.block2.imageAlt: Perfiles e historial de eventos en Bartendly para bares, bartenders y marcas
es.platform.current.block3.title: Crear la base para servicios, promoción y fidelización
es.platform.current.block3.text1: Cuando bares, eventos, personas y tráfico se vuelven estructurados, Bartendly puede apoyar de forma natural ofertas, visibilidad promocional, mecánicas de fidelización y nuevas herramientas para venues y marcas.
es.platform.current.block3.text2: La clave es que no son añadidos aleatorios. Crecen sobre la misma base del ecosistema.
es.platform.current.block3.imageAlt: Futuras capas de servicios, promoción y fidelización en Bartendly para bares y marcas
es.platform.audiences.title: Una plataforma, varios tipos de valor
es.platform.audiences.intro: Bartendly es útil para diferentes personas por diferentes razones, pero todos refuerzan el mismo ecosistema cuando interactúan con él.
es.platform.audiences.card1.label: Bartenders
es.platform.audiences.card1.title: Visibilidad, credibilidad y oportunidades
es.platform.audiences.card1.text: Para los bartenders, Bartendly puede convertirse en un lugar donde aparecer, ser vistos, construir valor de perfil, seguir oportunidades y conectarse con bares, marcas y eventos relevantes.
es.platform.audiences.card1.item2: Estar asociado a eventos y venues reales
es.platform.audiences.card1.item3: Acceder a futuras oportunidades de servicio y marketplace
es.platform.audiences.card2.label: Bares
es.platform.audiences.card2.title: Tráfico, visibilidad y nuevas capas de servicio
es.platform.audiences.card2.text: Para los bares, Bartendly puede convertirse en un canal de descubrimiento, una memoria de eventos, una capa de promoción y, más adelante, un lugar para ofertas, fidelización, visibilidad del equipo y solicitudes de servicio.
es.platform.audiences.card2.item1: Mostrar lo que sucede en el venue
es.platform.audiences.card2.item2: Mantener el historial de eventos vinculado al bar
es.platform.audiences.card2.item3: Evolucionar hacia herramientas de promoción, fidelización y staffing
es.platform.audiences.card3.label: Marcas
es.platform.audiences.card3.title: Presencia, relevancia y una futura capa de datos
es.platform.audiences.card3.text: Para las marcas, Bartendly puede convertirse en una forma de entender dónde aparecen, con quién, en qué ciudades y en qué tipo de eventos, al mismo tiempo que les da una capa de visibilidad con sentido.
es.platform.audiences.card3.item1: Estar vinculadas a eventos y venues reales
es.platform.audiences.card3.item2: Ganar visibilidad estructurada más allá de un post o una sola noche
es.platform.audiences.card3.item3: Preparar el terreno para insights y herramientas de activación
es.platform.audiences.card4.label: Invitados
es.platform.audiences.card4.title: Una forma más inteligente de explorar la escena de la coctelería
es.platform.audiences.card4.text: Para los amantes de la coctelería y los invitados curiosos, Bartendly puede convertirse en el lugar para descubrir qué está pasando, a dónde ir, qué bares importan y qué personas y marcas dan forma a la escena.
es.platform.audiences.card4.item1: Ver qué está pasando esta noche o esta semana
es.platform.audiences.card4.item2: Descubrir bares y eventos con más contexto
es.platform.audiences.card4.item3: Seguir una cultura de coctelería más rica y conectada
es.platform.marketplace.eyebrow: De Bartendly Experiences al futuro marketplace
es.platform.marketplace.title: Una evolución natural, no una idea desconectada
es.platform.marketplace.intro: Bartendly Experiences ya demuestra una capa real de coordinación para servicios premium de hospitality. Con el tiempo, ese conocimiento operativo puede evolucionar hacia flujos de marketplace más directos dentro de la app.
es.platform.marketplace.card1.title: Lo que existe hoy
es.platform.marketplace.card1.text: Un modelo de servicio curado y dirigido por personas para eventos premium. Eso significa demanda real, coordinación real y comprensión real de lo que requiere una ejecución de calidad en hospitality.
es.platform.marketplace.card1.step1.title: Servicio curado
es.platform.marketplace.card1.step1.text: Staffing de alta calidad para eventos mediante coordinación directa.
es.platform.marketplace.card1.step2.title: Aprendizaje operativo
es.platform.marketplace.card1.step2.text: Conocimiento real sobre solicitudes, calidad, encaje y ejecución.
es.platform.marketplace.card1.step3.title: Señal de demanda
es.platform.marketplace.card1.step3.text: Una base sólida para una futura lógica de marketplace dentro de la app.
es.platform.marketplace.card2.title: En qué puede convertirse
es.platform.marketplace.card2.text: Con el tiempo, el mismo ecosistema puede soportar solicitudes más estructuradas, matching, propuestas, listados de servicios y flujos de reserva, sin perder la lógica de calidad premium que hoy importa.
es.platform.marketplace.card2.step1.title: Solicitudes dentro de la app
es.platform.marketplace.card2.step1.text: Clientes, bares y venues expresan sus necesidades de forma estructurada.
es.platform.marketplace.card2.step2.title: Respuestas relevantes
es.platform.marketplace.card2.step2.text: Bartenders, bares o proveedores responden con encaje, no con ruido.
es.platform.marketplace.card2.step3.title: Capa de marketplace
es.platform.marketplace.card2.step3.text: La parte de servicios se vuelve escalable porque crece desde una red y unos datos reales.
es.platform.data.title: El valor profundo no es solo un evento, sino la red que se forma con el tiempo
es.platform.data.intro: A medida que eventos, venues, profesionales y marcas se estructuran y se conectan, Bartendly puede volverse más útil, más inteligente y más difícil de replicar.
es.platform.data.card1.title: Un mapa más rico de la escena
es.platform.data.card1.text: No solo listas de bares o eventos aislados, sino un mapa vivo de quién está activo, dónde está ocurriendo la energía y cómo se conectan ciudades y comunidades.
es.platform.data.card2.title: Mejor visibilidad para todos
es.platform.data.card2.text: Bares, bartenders y marcas se benefician cuando los eventos crean una visibilidad estructurada y duradera en lugar de desaparecer después de una noche.
es.platform.data.card3.title: Una base más sólida para herramientas
es.platform.data.card3.text: Promoción, fidelización, recomendaciones, flujos de marketplace e insights ganan valor cuando se apoyan en datos reales del ecosistema.
es.platform.data.card4.title: Un producto más defendible con el tiempo
es.platform.data.card4.text: Cuanto más refleje Bartendly el mundo real de la coctelería, más difícil será replicarlo con contenido genérico o listados genéricos de ocio nocturno.
es.platform.roadmap.title: Una hoja de ruta serena, construida desde la utilidad real
es.platform.roadmap.intro: La idea no es añadir funciones aleatorias. La idea es profundizar el valor de la misma capa de ecosistema en una secuencia creíble.
es.platform.roadmap.card1.title: Eventos, descubrimiento y perfiles
es.platform.roadmap.card1.text: Reforzar el punto de entrada: descubrir qué está pasando, a dónde ir, quién participa y cómo se conectan bares, bartenders y marcas.
es.platform.roadmap.card2.title: Capas de valor para bares
es.platform.roadmap.card2.text: Construir más utilidad para los venues a través de visibilidad, ofertas, fidelización, páginas de bar, tráfico de eventos y una presencia estructurada más rica.
es.platform.roadmap.card3.title: Marketplace e insights
es.platform.roadmap.card3.text: Permitir que servicios, solicitudes, propuestas, reservas e insights más avanzados crezcan sobre la misma red conectada.
es.platform.cta.title: Únete, entra o habla con nosotros
es.platform.cta.text: Tanto si eres bartender, bar, marca, invitado, partner o posible inversor, merece la pena entender Bartendly ahora porque el ecosistema se vuelve más valioso cuanto más conectado está.
es.platform.footer.text: Una plataforma en crecimiento que conecta bares, bartenders, marcas, eventos y amantes de la coctelería.
es.platform.stickyCta.label: Abrir Bartendly
es.platform.choice.title: Explora la plataforma o reserva la capa de servicio
es.platform.choice.intro: Bartendly combina una app en crecimiento para el ecosistema de la coctelería con una capa premium de servicios para la ejecución real de hospitality.
es.platform.choice.app.label: Bartendly App
es.platform.choice.app.title: Descubre eventos, bares, bartenders y marcas
es.platform.choice.app.text: Usa Bartendly para ver qué está pasando esta noche o esta semana, seguir guest shifts y festivales, explorar bares y entender quién está dando forma a la escena de la coctelería.
es.platform.choice.app.note: Para amantes de la coctelería, bartenders, bares, marcas y organizadores de eventos.
es.platform.choice.experiences.label: Bartendly Experiences
es.platform.choice.experiences.title: Reserva bartenders profesionales para eventos
es.platform.choice.experiences.text: Para ferias, eventos corporativos, activaciones de marca y eventos privados seleccionados, Bartendly Experiences ayuda a los clientes a encontrar bartenders profesionales y ofrecer un servicio de hospitality premium.
es.platform.choice.experiences.note: Para empresas, agencias, marcas, venues y clientes privados.
